projects.name: chickenscratch-core
projects.role: The engine - only code that reads/writes the .chikn format; git revisions; Pandoc compile (ADR-001)

projects.name: chikn-converter
projects.role: Scrivener <-> .chikn converter CLI; calls the engine, hosts the Scrivener parsing code

projects.name: chickenscratch
projects.role: Tauri backend - thin commands over the engine, plus app services (settings, keyring, AI)

projects.name: ui (npm)
projects.role: React + TipTap frontend; the reference GUI with src-tauri (ADR-003)

verification.status_note: Full suite run green locally 2026-07-09 as of 35f721a (format-lock slice E; each format-lock slice ran the suite green before committing). GitHub CI on master remains red until the workflow drift in .agents/state.md is fixed (workflows reference deleted native trees).
commands: cd ui && npm run lint && npm run build

conditional_commands.release: scripts/check-release-metadata.sh and RELEASE.md runbook (both currently reference deleted native trees - see .agents/state.md drift register)

policy.code_changes: Run the suite for touched areas before claiming completion (docs/INVARIANTS.md I9).
policy.docs_only: Code verification not required unless docs affect setup, commands, runtime behavior, generated files, or user-visible behavior.
policy.manual_behavior: Run the relevant manual check or smoke test for behavior not covered by automation, or state clearly that it was not run.

notes: AGENTS.md is now the portable AgentGovernanceBootstrap template, replaced whole on refresh and never hand-edited; ChickenScratch-specific rules live in .agents/repo-guidance.md, which points at docs/INVARIANTS.md, docs/PROJECT.md, docs/CURRENT_PHASE.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/AGENT-WORKFLOW.md, docs/HUMAN-GATE.md rather than duplicating them (decided 2026-07-03, see .agents/decisions.md).

docs/adr/ remains the product/architecture decision log; .agents/decisions.md holds governance/layout-level decisions and follows the toolkit's Open/Active/Adopted/Superseded lifecycle, archiving closed entries verbatim to docs/history/decisions-archive.md.
REVIEW.md and .review/ are the audit record of a completed 63-finding review cycle - history, not state.
scripts/check-release-metadata.sh requires REVIEW.md to stay export-ignored in .gitattributes; never delete or rename REVIEW.md.

macos/, windows/, linux/ native trees were deleted 2026-06-07 (ADR-004); CI and release scripts were cleaned of their references 2026-07-10 (docs/plans/PLAN_DEPRECATION_CLEANUP.md). Remaining doc stragglers and the pre-existing release-checksum blocker: .agents/state.md.
